project_type: React + Vite SPA (mind-mapping tool called ThoughtFlow/Clear Mind)
test_command: No test command configured (no test framework)
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to confirm the project compiles without errors
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification limited to build success.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Keyboard shortcuts are individual useEffect hooks that add/remove keydown listeners. Each shortcut follows the pattern: check if target is INPUT/TEXTAREA/SELECT/contentEditable, check for modifier keys, then handle the key. Toast notifications use showToast(msg) which sets toastMessage state (auto-clears after 2000ms). Canvas transform uses {x, y, scale} state applied via CSS translate+scale on a container div. selectedNodeIds is an array of selected card IDs. The nodes array contains objects with {id, x, y, title, content, theme, groupId}. The Focus icon from lucide-react is already imported and used for a 'Reset View' button that sets transform to {x:0, y:0, scale:1}.
directory_structure: Single-page app with all core logic in src/App.jsx. Supporting components: MiniMap.jsx, CardEditorPanel.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, ReminderPanel.jsx, FullTaskManager.jsx. State is managed with useState/useRef hooks in App.jsx.
